list.title: Medical Records
list.description: Review patient history and manage clinical notes.
list.resultsDescription: Choose a patient to review their medical record history.

filters.title: Patient selection
filters.description: Search patients and load their medical records.

details.notFoundDescription: This medical record is no longer available.

form.createDescription: Add a new clinical entry for the selected patient.
form.formDescription: Fill in the medical record details below.
form.prescriptionsPlaceholder: Add a short prescriptions note if needed
form.inactiveDoctorHint: This doctor is no longer active. Select an active doctor before saving.

states.loadingOptionsDescription: Please wait while patients and doctors are loaded.
states.selectPatientDescription: Choose a patient above to view their medical record history.
states.emptyDescription: This patient does not have any medical records yet.
states.emptyPatientsDescription: Create a patient before adding medical records.
states.emptyDoctorsDescription: Create a doctor before adding medical records.
states.unauthorizedDescription: Your session is not authorized for this request.
states.forbiddenDescription: You do not have permission to access this resource.
states.writeForbiddenDescription: Only doctors and admins can create or edit medical records.
states.errorDescription: We could not load medical record data.

errors.list: We could not load the medical records list.
errors.details: We could not load this medical record.
errors.save: We could not save the medical record.
errors.delete: We could not delete the medical record.
errors.prescriptions: We could not load the linked prescriptions.
errors.prescriptionSave: We could not save the prescription.
errors.prescriptionDelete: We could not delete the prescription.
errors.patients: We could not load patient options.
errors.doctors: We could not load doctor options.
errors.invalidPatient: Select a valid patient to continue.
errors.invalidData: Please check the medical record details and try again.
errors.invalidPrescriptionData: Please check the prescription details and try again.
errors.writeForbidden: You do not have permission to change medical records.
errors.notFound: The medical record could not be found.
errors.inactiveDoctor: The selected doctor is inactive. Please choose an active doctor.

prescriptions.title: Linked prescriptions
prescriptions.description: Review and manage prescriptions linked to this medical record.
prescriptions.formDescription: Fill in the prescription details below.
prescriptions.empty: No linked prescriptions were found for this record.

related.emptyDescription: Medical records will appear here after they are created.
